definition: radiance thermometer that compares the radiation produced by a hot object with the radiation produced by a hot filament, the temperature measured corresponding to the temperature of the hot filament when the intensities are equal

definition_ml.en: radiance thermometer that compares the radiation produced by a hot object with the radiation produced by a hot filament, the temperature measured corresponding to the temperature of the hot filament when the intensities are equal
definition_ml.de: Strahldichte-Strahlungsthermometer, das die Strahlung, die von einem heißen Objekt ausgesendet wird, mit der Strahlung vergleicht, die von einem heißen Draht ausgesendet wird, dessen Temperatur dieselbe ist, wenn die Intensitäten gleich sind

raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: radiance thermometer that compares the radiation produced by a hot object with the radiation produced by a hot filament, the temperature measured corresponding to the temperature of the hot filament when the intensities are equal
